message:
Running command: 
# Verify the PnR is actually running
ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|yosys)" | grep -v grep | head -10
echo "==="
# Check what step we're at
ls /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/ | sort -V | tail -10
echo "==="
# Check the synthesis results from step 77 (new synthesis with chip.v added)
cat /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/docs/pnr/synthesis_update.md 2>/dev/null | head -40
